benefits.description: Anecdotally better results with MK-677 compared to GHRP-6

protocol_notes: Recommends ditching most peptides except Tesamorelin at 2mg/day and adding MK-677. Advises against IGF-LR3, calling it 'trash'. Suggests GH for solid results. Notes that GHRH peptides won't do much for someone already shredded unless benefiting from sleep effects.
